PREAMBLE

WE, THE PEOPLE OF INDIA, having solemnly resolved to constitute India into a SOVEREIGN DEMOCRATIC REPUBLIC.

PART V
THE UNION

CHAPTER I. ⎯ THE EXECUTIVE

General

52. The President of India.—There shall be a President of India.

The President and Vice-President

53. Executive power of the Union.—The executive power of the Union shall be vested in the President.

CHAPTER II. ⎯ PARLIAMENT

General

79. Constitution of Parliament.—There shall be a Parliament for the Union.
